name: Survive Lava for Brainrots!
description: Run faster and collect Brainrots! Avoid the rising lava! Upgrade your Brainrots! Upgrade your base to place more Brainrots!
instructions: Run forward collect Brainrots and try not to get caught by the rising lava Upgrade your Brainrots to earn more and improve your base to place even more characters
